source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question requiring a floating-point number with one decimal place and provide the final value, e.g., 1.2, 1.3, 1.4, at the end.
Question: In the stable closed-loop system shown in <image>, the asymptotic Bode magnitude plot of \( G(s) \) has a constant slope of \(-20 \, \text{dB/decade}\) at least till \( 100 \, \text{rad/sec} \) with the gain crossover frequency being \( 10 \, \text{rad/sec} \). The asymptotic Bode phase plot remains constant at \(-90^\circ\) at least till \( \omega = 10 \, \text{rad/sec} \). The steady-state error of the closed-loop system for a unit ramp input is _____ (rounded off to 2 decimal places).
